flags.name: ENABLE_POSTGRES
flags.description: Enables Postgres-backed session and pattern storage.

flags.name: ENABLE_QDRANT
flags.description: Enables Qdrant vector store for semantic pattern retrieval.

flags.name: ENABLE_INTELLIGENCE_CACHE
flags.description: Caches intelligence node results to reduce LLM calls.

flags.name: USE_EVENT_ROUTING
flags.description: Routes commands/events through the ONEX event bus.

flags.name: DUAL_PUBLISH_LEGACY_TOPICS
flags.description: Publishes to both new and legacy topic names during migration.

flags.name: USE_ONEX_ROUTING_NODES
flags.description: Routes LLM calls through ONEX routing node graph.

flags.name: ENABLE_PATTERN_QUALITY_FILTER
flags.description: Filters patterns below quality threshold before storage.

flags.name: ENABLE_DISABLED_PATTERN_FILTER
flags.description: Excludes disabled patterns from retrieval results.

flags.name: ENABLE_PHASE_1_VALIDATION
flags.description: Phase 1 validation gate: structural contract checks.

flags.name: ENABLE_PHASE_2_SEMANTIC
flags.description: Phase 2 validation gate: semantic consistency checks.

flags.name: ENABLE_PHASE_3_INTEGRATION
flags.description: Phase 3 validation gate: cross-service integration checks.

flags.name: ENABLE_PHASE_4_AI_QUORUM
flags.description: Phase 4 validation gate: multi-model AI quorum review.

flags.name: ENABLE_LOCAL_INFERENCE_PIPELINE
flags.description: Routes inference to local GPU endpoints first.

flags.name: ENABLE_PATTERN_ENFORCEMENT
flags.description: Enforces pattern schema and lifecycle rules.

flags.name: USE_LLM_ROUTING
flags.description: Enables dynamic LLM routing via contract model_routing config.

flags.name: ENABLE_DELEGATION
flags.description: Enables the cheapest-first delegation chain of responders.

flags.name: ENABLE_METRICS
flags.description: Emits runtime metrics from the ONEX node runtime.

flags.name: ENABLE_IDEMPOTENCE
flags.description: Enforces idempotent envelope handling on the event bus.

flags.name: ENABLE_RUNTIME_LOG_BRIDGE
flags.description: Bridges runtime logs onto the structured log event topic.

flags.name: ENABLE_EVENT_INTELLIGENCE
flags.description: Enables event intelligence processing pipeline.

flags.name: ENABLE_KAFKA_LOGGING
flags.description: Routes structured logs through Kafka.

flags.name: ENABLE_REAL_TIME_EVENTS
flags.description: Opens WebSocket channel for live event stream.

flags.name: ENABLE_EVENT_PRELOAD
flags.description: Pre-fetches events on dashboard mount.

flags.name: ENABLE_RESPONSE_CACHE
flags.description: Enables response-level projection cache.

flags.name: ARCHON_ENABLE_EXTERNAL_GATEWAY
flags.description: Routes inference through external Archon gateway.

flags.name: VITE_USE_MOCK_DATA
flags.description: Forces fixture data in place of live projections.

flags.name: OMNIDASH_READ_MODEL_USE_CATALOG
flags.description: Switches read model to catalog-based source.
